name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual reconciliation processes.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual reconciliation processes.
